_publications._publicationTitle: Long Noncoding RNA WT1-AS Inhibit Cell Malignancy via miR-494-3p in Glioma.

_contextSnippet: WT1-AS expression was markedly increased in both the U87 and U118 cells at 48-hour posttransfection
details: WT1-AS expression was markedly increased at 48-hour post-transfection with WT1-AS plasmid
